2023-24 Memphis Tigers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 22-10 (11-7, 5th in AAC MBB)

Coach: Anfernee Hardaway

PS/G: 80.5 (31st of 362)

PA/G: 75.8 (287th of 362)

SRS: 8.99 (75th of 362)

SOS: 4.25 (94th of 362)

ORtg: 110.9 (75th of 362)

DRtg: 104.4 (193rd of 362)

Preseason Odds: Championship +6000
